## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --locked`

## Documentation

- [ ] User-facing docs updated, or not needed
- [ ] Samples updated, or not needed

## Safety

- [ ] No OAuth tokens, auth state, local session databases, or private media were committed
- [ ] Existing stable JSON fields are preserved, or the breaking change is explicitly documented
